description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black backpack from adidas. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of.MeasurementHeight: 16"Width: 11"Depth: 5"Made of polyester and polyurethane for enhanced durabilityOne roomy compartment with an inner compartmentBrand name with the adidas patented 3-Stripes printed on the frontOne zippered compartment on the frontHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useNylon bonded thread for long lifeCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
